overall.description: A nighttime metro journey through a futuristic cyberpunk city, featuring the NCART train system from Cyberpunk 2077. The footage captures the train departing a neon-lit station, traveling through dense urban canyons between skyscrapers, and arriving at Glen North station with prominent red signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated NCART metro station platform with neon signage

events.description: train begins moving from stationary position at the platform
exiting the station canopy into the open urban environment

agents.ego_description: seated in the metro train departing the NCART station, observing the platform and waiting passengers receding

notable_agents.action: passenger in red clothing standing on the platform near the edge
group of passengers waiting near the station entrance

entered.detail: large cyan neon sign with NCART text identifying the station
blue neon corporate signage on the station wall
concrete platform with yellow safety tactile paving strips
tall illuminated palm tree near the station entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the NCART metro station platform, with the train initially stationary before accelerating forward. Neon signs illuminate the platform where sparse crowds wait, and the train passes under the station canopy into the open city.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated track passing through dense urban canyon between skyscrapers

events.description: entering dark shadow zone between tall buildings with minimal ambient light
large building facade temporarily blocks the view of the city ahead

agents.ego_description: traveling through a narrow dark corridor formed by towering buildings on both sides of the track

entered.detail: tall building with grid pattern of illuminated windows
reflection of city lights and buildings on the train window glass

segments.scene_description: The train travels through a narrow urban canyon between towering skyscrapers, with low lighting and reflections visible on the window glass. The environment is enclosed and dark, with building facades passing closely on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated track with panoramic view of downtown skyscrapers approaching Glen North station

events.description: emerging from the dark canyon into open cityscape with visible skyline and neon advertisements
train decelerating as it approaches the Glen North station platform

agents.ego_description: approaching Glen North station with expansive views of the illuminated downtown skyscrapers and neon signage ahead

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading GLEN NORTH identifying the approaching station
cluster of tall buildings with various illuminated windows and neon advertisements

segments.scene_description: The train emerges from the dark canyon into a wide-open cityscape with views of downtown skyscrapers. The prominent red Glen North neon sign becomes visible as the train slows down approaching the station.

scene_state.functional_zone: Glen North metro station platform with prominent red neon identification signage

events.description: arriving at Glen North station platform with the red neon sign dominating the view
train comes to a complete stop at the station platform
train begins accelerating away from the station

agents.ego_description: stopped at Glen North station, observing passengers waiting on the platform through the train window

notable_agents.action: passenger standing near the platform edge waiting for the train doors to open

entered.detail: concrete station platform with yellow tactile paving and safety barriers
metal seating along the station wall for waiting passengers

segments.scene_description: The train arrives at Glen North station, stopping at the platform dominated by the large red neon sign. Passengers are visible waiting on the platform before the train departs again.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train track passing through dense urban architecture with close building walls

events.description: train accelerating away from Glen North station into the urban canyon
entering darker enclosed section of the urban canyon with close building facades

agents.ego_description: departing Glen North and continuing through the neon-lit urban canyon with close building facades passing by

entered.detail: close beige concrete building facade with small illuminated windows
exposed steel beams and track infrastructure supporting the elevated rail

segments.scene_description: The train accelerates away from Glen North station, traveling through a narrow urban canyon with close building walls and exposed support structures. The environment becomes darker as the train moves deeper into the enclosed track section.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey on an NCART metro train that travels from a neon-lit station through a claustrophobic urban canyon and back into the dark city depths. It begins at a station platform where the train accelerates forward, passing under a canopy and leaving behind sparse crowds illuminated by neon signs. As the train enters a narrow urban canyon, the environment becomes enclosed and dark, with towering skyscraper facades passing closely and reflecting off the window glass. The scene then opens into a wide cityscape of downtown skyscrapers before the train slows down to arrive at Glen North station, dominated by a prominent red neon sign and waiting passengers. Finally, the train accelerates away from the platform, plunging back into a dark, narrow corridor of close building walls and exposed support structures.
